user.title: Too Good To Go
user.description: Enter your Too Good To Go email address. A PIN code will be sent to your inbox.

pin.title: Enter PIN Code
pin.description:
A PIN code has been sent to **{email}**.

Check your inbox and enter the PIN below.

options.title: Update interval
options.description: How often should Home Assistant check for available bags?

error.invalid_pin: Incorrect PIN code. Check your email and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Too Good To Go. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.missing_dependency: The tgtg package is not installed. Restart Home Assistant and try again.
error.too_many_requests: Too many login attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
error.not_registered: This email is not linked to a Too Good To Go account. Please sign up in the TGTG app first.

abort.already_configured: This Too Good To Go account is already configured.
